ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "blueprint" TEXT /* Description of the project blueprint */,
  "design" TEXT /* Current design status of the project */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current delivery status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., Essential, High) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the project */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series or category that the project belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred by the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for which the project is being done */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, developer, designer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Approved, Implemented) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status signifies */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the status in the UI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., Essential, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the priority level in the UI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the discussion */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the discussion */,
  "discussion_content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the task at the time of assignment */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level of the task at the time of assignment */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was completed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the change */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the task */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level of the task */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
